title: peritoma platycarpa
intro: Peritoma platycarpa, also known as the Mexican horse gentian, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Peritoma platycarpa include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Peritoma platycarpa can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by mixing the plant's extracts with other herbs to create a tincture or salve.
